content: Standard betting-app notification set (bet365, FanDuel, PushEngage growth playbook): bet settled (won/lost) status change, odds/line change on open bets, cash-out value available/threshold reached, odds boosts and promo alerts. Settlement is shown with visual won/lost indicators (green check/red cross) inside a 'My Bets' area; settled bets typically remain visible ~90 days before archiving to history. Note: industry data shows the bulk of push notifications on major betting apps are promotional/advertising (93% contained ad material, 62% urged placing a bet) - flagged as a consumer-protection concern by NCL, relevant as an anti-pattern to avoid replicating. Responsible-gambling regulations separately mandate non-promotional notifications: reality-check pop-ups (elapsed time/amount wagered at intervals), and mandatory notices for self-exclusion/limit-reached events; marketing messages must stop entirely once a user self-excludes.
